news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST Bitcoin ETF (XBTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Bitcoin. The fund sells put options to generate income and holds other ETFs that pursue leveraged exposure to BTC. XBTY was launched on May 12, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
